Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************
 Fibers of the arrow bicategory

 In this file, we calculate the fibers of the arrow bicategory

 1. To the fiber
 2. From the fiber
 3. The unit
 4. The counit
 5. The modifications
 6. The biequivalence

 *******************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Slice.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.FiberBicategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.CleavingOfBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Biequivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.ExamplesOfCleavings.CodomainCleaving.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope bicategory_scope.

Section FiberOfCodomain.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (b : B).

  (**
   1. Calculation of operations in fiber
   *)
  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
pr1 (α • β) = pr1 α • pr1 β

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
pr1 (α • β) = pr1 α • pr1 β

    apply transportf_cell_of_cod_over.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = lunitor (pr1 f)

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = lunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = ?b
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = lunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = ?b

      apply transportf_cell_of_cod_over.
    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (id_disp x ;; f)
     (FiberCategory.idempunitor b) •• disp_lunitor f) =
lunitor (pr1 f)

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f) = linvunitor (pr1 f)

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f) = linvunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f) = ?b
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = linvunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f) = ?b

      apply transportf_cell_of_cod_over.
    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (disp_linvunitor f
   •• disp_inv_cell
        (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (id_disp x ;; f)
           (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))) =
linvunitor (pr1 f)

    apply id2_right.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (runitor f) = runitor (pr1 f)

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)

pr1 (runitor f) = runitor (pr1 f)

b: B

f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)

B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧

      apply transportf_cell_of_cod_over.
    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; id_disp y)
     (FiberCategory.idempunitor b) •• disp_runitor f) =
runitor (pr1 f)

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (rinvunitor f) = rinvunitor (pr1 f)

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)

B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (disp_rinvunitor f
   •• disp_inv_cell
        (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; id_disp y)
           (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))) =
rinvunitor (pr1 f)

    apply id2_right.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f g h) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

  
B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f g h) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    
B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f g h) = ?b
B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧

?b = lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    
B: bicat
b: B

B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (((disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
       (f ;; local_iso_cleaving_1cell
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (g ;; h)
               (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))
       (FiberCategory.idempunitor b)
     •• (f
         ◃◃ disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (g ;; h)
              (FiberCategory.idempunitor b)))
    •• disp_lassociator f g h)
   •• ((disp_inv_cell
          (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; g)
             (FiberCategory.idempunitor b)) ▹▹ h)
       •• disp_inv_cell
            (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
               (local_iso_cleaving_1cell
                  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; g)
                  (FiberCategory.idempunitor b) ;; h)
               (FiberCategory.idempunitor b)))) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    
B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
((id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h))
  • (pr1 f ◃ id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h)))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))
• ((id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) ▹ pr1 h)
   • id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    
B: bicat
b: B

h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

b: B

((id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)

 • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))

B: bicat
b: B
w, x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
pr1 (f ◃ α) = pr1 f ◃ pr1 α

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
pr1 (f ◃ α) = pr1 f ◃ pr1 α

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
pr1 (f ◃ α) = ?b
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
?b = pr1 f ◃ pr1 α

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
pr1 (f ◃ α) = ?b

      apply transportf_cell_of_cod_over.
    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
pr1
  ((disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; g)
      (FiberCategory.idempunitor b) •• (f ◃◃ α))
   •• disp_inv_cell
        (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; h)
           (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))) =
pr1 f ◃ pr1 α

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
(id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f ◃ pr1 α))
• id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 h) = pr1 f ◃ pr1 α

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: g ==> h
pr1 f ◃ pr1 α = pr1 f ◃ pr1 α

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B

h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)

pr1 (α ▹ h) = pr1 α ▹ pr1 h

  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b

pr1
  ((disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (f ;; h)
      (FiberCategory.idempunitor b) •• (α ▹▹ h))
   •• disp_inv_cell
        (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) (g ;; h)
           (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))) =

B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
(id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 h) • (pr1 α ▹ pr1 h))
• id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h) = pr1 α ▹ pr1 h

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 α ▹ pr1 h = pr1 α ▹ pr1 h

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
α = β

  
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
α = β

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 f ==>[ id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1 g,
   let PPP := (id₁ b,, pr1 f) ==> (id₁ b,, pr1 g) in
   pr2 f ==>[ id₂ (id₁ b),, x0 : PPP] pr2 g)
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
pr1 α = pr1 β

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 f ==>[ id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1 g,
   let PPP := (id₁ b,, pr1 f) ==> (id₁ b,, pr1 g) in
   pr2 f ==>[ id₂ (id₁ b),, x0 : PPP] pr2 g)

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
x0: pr1 f ==>[ id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1 g
isaprop
  (let PPP := (id₁ b,, pr1 f) ==> (id₁ b,, pr1 g) in
   pr2 f ==>[ id₂ (id₁ b),, x0] pr2 g)

      apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
p: pr1 α = pr1 β
pr1 α = pr1 β

    exact p.
  Qed.

  (**
   2. To the fiber
   *)
  
B: bicat
b: B
psfunctor_data (slice_bicat b)
  (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)

  
B: bicat
b: B
psfunctor_data (slice_bicat b)
  (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)

    
B: bicat
b: B
slice_bicat b
→ strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
    (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
B: bicat
b: B
∏ a b0 : slice_bicat b,
slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
→ strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
    (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b0 ⟧
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 : slice_bicat b)
(f g : slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b0 f ==> ?F₁ a b0 g
B: bicat
b: B
∏ a : slice_bicat b, id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 c : slice_bicat b)
(f : slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : slice_bicat b ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b0 f · ?F₁ b0 c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

    
B: bicat
b: B
slice_bicat b
→ strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
    (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
 exact (λ f, f).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ a b0 : slice_bicat b,
slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
→ strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
    (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
  ⟦ (λ f : slice_bicat b, f) a,
  (λ f : slice_bicat b, f) b0 ⟧
 exact (λ a₁ a₂ g,
             pr1 g
             ,,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (pr2 g)).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 : slice_bicat b)
(f g : slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (a₁ a₂ : slice_bicat b)
   (g0 : slice_bicat b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) a
    b0 f ==>
  (λ (a₁ a₂ : slice_bicat b)
   (g0 : slice_bicat b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) a
    b0 g
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 : ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧)
(f : ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b0 ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 a) (f · pr2 b0))
(g : ∑ f0 : B ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b0 ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 a) (f0 · pr2 b0)),
total_prebicat_cell_struct (slice_disp_prebicat b) a
  b0 f g
→ ∑ xx : pr1 f ==> pr1 g,
  (runitor (pr2 a) • pr2 f) • (xx ▹ pr2 b0) =
  (pr2 a ◃ id₂ (id₁ b)) • (runitor (pr2 a) • pr2 g)

      
B: bicat
b: B
a₁, a₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 a₁, pr1 a₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁) (f · pr2 a₂)
β: total_prebicat_cell_struct (slice_disp_prebicat b)
  a₁ a₂ g₁ g₂
(runitor (pr2 a₁) • pr2 g₁) • (pr1 β ▹ pr2 a₂) =
(pr2 a₁ ◃ id₂ (id₁ b)) • (runitor (pr2 a₁) • pr2 g₂)

      abstract
        (rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         exact (pr2 β)).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ a : slice_bicat b,
id₁ ((λ f : slice_bicat b, f) a) ==>
(λ (a₁ a₂ : slice_bicat b)
 (g : slice_bicat b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g)) a a
  (id₁ a)
 
B: bicat
b: B
a: slice_bicat b
pr2 (id₁ a) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b),, id₂ (pr1 (id₁ a))] pr2
                                   (pr1 (id₁ a),,
                                    comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                      (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                         (pr2 a))
                                      (pr2 (id₁ a)))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 c : slice_bicat b)
(f : slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : slice_bicat b ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
(λ (a₁ a₂ : slice_bicat b)
 (g0 : slice_bicat b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) a b0
  f
· (λ (a₁ a₂ : slice_bicat b)
   (g0 : slice_bicat b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) b0
    c g ==>
(λ (a₁ a₂ : slice_bicat b)
 (g0 : slice_bicat b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) a c
  (f · g)
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 c : ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧)
(f : ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b0 ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 a) (f · pr2 b0))
(g : ∑ f0 : B ⟦ pr1 b0, pr1 c ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 b0) (f0 · pr2 c)),
∑ xx : pr1 f · pr1 g ==> pr1 f · pr1 g,
((pr2 a ◃ linvunitor (id₁ b))
 • ((((lassociator (pr2 a) (id₁ b) (id₁ b)
       • ((runitor (pr2 a) • pr2 f) ▹ id₁ b))
      • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 b0) (id₁ b))
     • (pr1 f ◃ (runitor (pr2 b0) • pr2 g)))
    • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 c)))
• (xx ▹ pr2 c) =
(pr2 a ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
• (runitor (pr2 a)
   • (pr2 f
      • ((pr1 f ◃ pr2 g)
         • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 c))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
a₁, a₂, a₃: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g₁: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 a₁, pr1 a₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁) (f · pr2 a₂)
g₂: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 a₂, pr1 a₃ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 a₂) (f · pr2 a₃)
((pr2 a₁ ◃ linvunitor (id₁ b))
 • ((((lassociator (pr2 a₁) (id₁ b) (id₁ b)
       • ((runitor (pr2 a₁) • pr2 g₁) ▹ id₁ b))
      • rassociator (pr1 g₁) (pr2 a₂) (id₁ b))
     • (pr1 g₁ ◃ (runitor (pr2 a₂) • pr2 g₂)))
    • lassociator (pr1 g₁) (pr1 g₂) (pr2 a₃)))
• (id₂ (pr1 g₁ · pr1 g₂) ▹ pr2 a₃) =
(pr2 a₁ ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
• (runitor (pr2 a₁)
   • (pr2 g₁
      • ((pr1 g₁ ◃ pr2 g₂)
         • lassociator (pr1 g₁) (pr1 g₂) (pr2 a₃))))

      abstract
        (rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
         rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp, <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         do 2 apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite <- lunitor_lwhisker ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite runitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
b: B
psfunctor_laws to_fiber_cod_data

  
B: bicat
b: B
psfunctor_laws to_fiber_cod_data

    
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     to_fiber_cod_data (id₂ f)) =
pr1 (id₂ (# to_fiber_cod_data f))
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: slice_bicat b
f, g, h: slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     to_fiber_cod_data (η • φ)) =
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     to_fiber_cod_data η
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       to_fiber_cod_data φ)
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
pr1 (lunitor (# to_fiber_cod_data f)) =
pr1
  (((PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id to_fiber_cod_data
       a ▹ # to_fiber_cod_data f)
    • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        to_fiber_cod_data (id₁ a) f)
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       to_fiber_cod_data (lunitor f))
B: bicat
b: B

B: bicat
b: B
a, b0, c: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp to_fiber_cod_data
     f g)

        
B: bicat
b: B

f: slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b))
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp to_fiber_cod_data
     f g)

        
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0, c: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  (**
   3. From the fiber
   *)

psfunctor_data
  (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) (slice_bicat b)

b: B
∏
a
 b0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
→ slice_bicat b ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b0 ⟧
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(a
 b0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f
 g : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b0 f ==> ?F₁ a b0 g
B: bicat
b: B
∏
a : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(a b0
 c : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b0 f · ?F₁ b0 c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)

 exact (λ f, f).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
a
 b0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
→ slice_bicat b
  ⟦ (λ f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b, f) a,
  (λ f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b, f) b0 ⟧
 exact (λ a₁ a₂ g,
             pr1 g
             ,,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (pr2 g)).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(a
 b0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f
 g : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (a₁
      a₂ : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
   (g0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0))
    a b0 f ==>
  (λ (a₁
      a₂ : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
   (g0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0))
    a b0 g
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧)
(f
 g : ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b0 ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 a · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 b0)),
(∑ xx : pr1 f ==> pr1 g,
 pr12 f • (xx ▹ pr2 b0) =
 (pr2 a ◃ id₂ (id₁ b)) • pr12 g)
→ total_prebicat_cell_struct (slice_disp_prebicat b) a
    b0
    (pr1 f,,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a)) (pr2 f))
    (pr1 g,,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a)) (pr2 g))

      
B: bicat
b: B
a₁, a₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 a₁, pr1 a₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁ · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 a₂)
β: ∑ xx : pr1 g₁ ==> pr1 g₂,
pr12 g₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 a₂) =
(pr2 a₁ ◃ id₂ (id₁ b)) • pr12 g₂
pr2
  (pr1 g₁,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g₁)) ==>[
pr1 β] pr2
         (pr1 g₂,,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁))
            (pr2 g₂))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (pr2 β) @ _) ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
a : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
id₁
  ((λ f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b, f) a) ==>
(λ (a₁
    a₂ : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
 (g : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g)) a a
  (id₁ a)
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ a : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
total_prebicat_cell_struct (slice_disp_prebicat b) a a
  (id₁ (pr1 a),, linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a))
  (id₁ (pr1 a),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a))
     ((runitor (pr2 a) • linvunitor (pr2 a)),,
      is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 a))
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 a))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
a: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧
pr2
  (id₁ (pr1 a),, linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a)) ==>[
id₂
  (pr1
     (id₁ (pr1 a),,
      linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a)))] pr2
                                               (id₁
                                                 (pr1
                                                 a),,
                                                comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                                 (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a))
                                                 ((runitor
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a)
                                                 • linvunitor
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a)),,
                                                 is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_runitor
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a))
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a))))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(a b0
 c : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
(λ (a₁
    a₂ : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
 (g0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) a
  b0 f
· (λ (a₁
      a₂ : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
   (g0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0))
    b0 c g ==>
(λ (a₁
    a₂ : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
 (g0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁)) (pr2 g0)) a
  c (f · g)
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (a b0 c : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧)
(f : ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b0 ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 a · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 b0))
(g : ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 b0, pr1 c ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 b0 · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 c)),
total_prebicat_cell_struct (slice_disp_prebicat b) a c
  (pr1 f · pr1 g,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a)) (pr2 f))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 b0))
              (pr2 g)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
           (pr2 c))))
  (pr1 f · pr1 g,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 a)
           (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))
        (((((lassociator (pr2 a) (id₁ b) (id₁ b)
             • (pr12 f ▹ id₁ b))
            • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 b0) (id₁ b))
           • (pr1 f ◃ pr12 g))
          • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 c)),,
         is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                       (pr2 a) (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                       (id₁ b) (pr22 f)))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                    (pr1 f) (pr2 b0) (id₁ b)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr1 f)
                 (pr22 g)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (pr1 f)
              (pr1 g) (pr2 c)))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
a₁, a₂, a₃: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧
g₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 a₁, pr1 a₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁ · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 a₂)
g₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 a₂, pr1 a₃ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 a₂ · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 a₃)
pr2
  (pr1 g₁ · pr1 g₂,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁))
        (pr2 g₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g₁)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₂))
              (pr2 g₂)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g₁)
           (pr1 g₂) (pr2 a₃)))) ==>[
id₂
  (pr1
     (pr1 g₁ · pr1 g₂,,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₁))
           (pr2 g₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g₁)
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 a₂))
                 (pr2 g₂)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g₁)
              (pr1 g₂) (pr2 a₃)))))] pr2
                                       (pr1 g₁
                                        · pr1 g₂,,
                                        comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                          (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                             (pr2 a₁))
                                          (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                             (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                                (pr2
                                                 a₁)
                                                (FiberCategory.idempunitor
                                                 b))
                                             (((((lassociator
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a₁)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b)
                                                 • 
                                                 (pr12 g₁
                                                 ▹ 
                                                 id₁ b))
                                                 • 
                                                 rassociator
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a₂)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b))
                                                • 
                                                (pr1
                                                 g₁
                                                 ◃ pr12 g₂))
                                               • lassociator
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₁)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₂)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a₃)),,
                                              is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                                                (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a₁)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b))
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b)
                                                 (pr22 g₁)))
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a₂)
                                                 (id₁
                                                 b)))
                                                 (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₁)
                                                 (pr22 g₂)))
                                                (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₁)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 g₂)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 a₃)))))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         do 2 apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite !lwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite triangle_r_inv ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp, <- lwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite left_unit_inv_assoc ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_natural ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         refine (_ @ id2_right _) ;
         use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         cbn ;
         use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite <- runitor_triangle ;
         rewrite runitor_lunitor_identity ;
         rewrite lunitor_lwhisker ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
b: B
psfunctor_laws from_fiber_cod_data

  
B: bicat
b: B
psfunctor_laws from_fiber_cod_data

    
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     from_fiber_cod_data (id₂ f)) =
pr1 (id₂ (# from_fiber_cod_data f))
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f, g, h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     from_fiber_cod_data (η • φ)) =
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     from_fiber_cod_data η
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_cod_data φ)
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
pr1 (lunitor (# from_fiber_cod_data f)) =
pr1
  (((PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
       from_fiber_cod_data a ▹ # from_fiber_cod_data f)
    • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        from_fiber_cod_data (id₁ a) f)
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_cod_data (lunitor f))
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
pr1 (runitor (# from_fiber_cod_data f)) =
pr1
  (((# from_fiber_cod_data f
     ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
         from_fiber_cod_data b0)
    • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        from_fiber_cod_data f (id₁ b0))
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_cod_data (runitor f))
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0, c, d: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
h: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ c, d ⟧
pr1
  (((# from_fiber_cod_data f
     ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
         from_fiber_cod_data g h)
    • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
        from_fiber_cod_data f (g · h))
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_cod_data (lassociator f g h)) =
pr1
  ((lassociator (# from_fiber_cod_data f)
      (# from_fiber_cod_data g)
      (# from_fiber_cod_data h)
    • (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
         from_fiber_cod_data f g
       ▹ # from_fiber_cod_data h))
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
       from_fiber_cod_data (f · g) h)
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0, c: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g₁, g₂: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     from_fiber_cod_data f g₁
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_cod_data (f ◃ η)) =
pr1
  ((# from_fiber_cod_data f
    ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
        from_fiber_cod_data η)
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
       from_fiber_cod_data f g₂)
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0, c: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f₁, f₂: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp

a, b0, c: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     from_fiber_cod_data f g)
 
B: bicat
b: B
a, b0, c: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ b0, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  (**
   4. The unit
   *)
  
B: bicat
b: B
pstrans_data (id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b))
  (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod)

  
B: bicat
b: B
pstrans_data (id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b))
  (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod)

    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ X : slice_bicat b,
slice_bicat b ⟦ id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b) X,
comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod X ⟧
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (X Y : slice_bicat b) (f : slice_bicat b ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X
   · # (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b)) f · ?η₁ Y)

    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ X : slice_bicat b,
slice_bicat b ⟦ id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b) X,
comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod X ⟧
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ X : ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧,
∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 X ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 X) (f · pr2 X)

      exact (λ f, id₁ _ ,, linvunitor_invertible_2cell _).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (X Y : slice_bicat b) (f : slice_bicat b ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (((λ f0 : ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧,
     id₁ (pr1 f0),,
     linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f0))
    :
    ∏ X0 : slice_bicat b,
    slice_bicat b ⟦ id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b) X0,
    comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod X0 ⟧) X
   · # (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b)) f
   · ((λ f0 : ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧,
       id₁ (pr1 f0),,
       linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f0))
      :
      ∏ X0 : slice_bicat b,
      slice_bicat b ⟦ id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b) X0,
      comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod X0 ⟧)
       Y)
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (X Y : ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧)
(f : ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧,
     invertible_2cell (pr2 X) (f · pr2 Y)),
invertible_2cell
  (id₁ (pr1 X) · pr1 f,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 X))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 X))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 X))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 X))
                 (pr2 f))))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 X))
           (pr1 f) (pr2 Y))))
  (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 Y),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 f)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 Y)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)) (pr2 Y))))

f₁, f₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (f · pr2 f₂)
invertible_2cell
  (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell

                 (pr2 g))))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
           (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂))))
  (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))

           (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂))))

(id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))

(pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)

         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))

         (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂))))

b: B
f₁, f₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (f · pr2 f₂)
(λ η : pr1
         (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 f₁))
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (runitor_invertible_2cell
                           (pr2 f₁)) (pr2 g))))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>
       pr1
         (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 f₂)))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂)))),
 pr2
   (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
                  (pr2 g))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>[
 η] pr2
      (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂))))) ?pr1

pr1
  (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,

b: B
f₁, f₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (f · pr2 f₂)
id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g ==> pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂)

          exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B: bicat
b: B
f₁, f₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (f · pr2 f₂)
(λ η : pr1
         (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 f₁))
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (runitor_invertible_2cell
                           (pr2 f₁)) (pr2 g))))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>
       pr1
         (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 f₂)))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂)))),
 pr2
   (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
                  (pr2 g))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>[
 η] pr2
      (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂)))))
  (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)
   :
   pr1
     (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
                    (pr2 g))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>
   pr1
     (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
              (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂)))))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
             rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite linvunitor_assoc ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
             apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
b: B
f₁, f₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (f · pr2 f₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)
    :
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
               (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr2 f₁))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 f₁)) (pr2 g))))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell
               (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂))))),,
   to_fiber_cod_unit_data_subproof f₁ f₂ g
   :
   (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁))
                  (pr2 g))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (pr1 g) (pr2 f₂)))) ==>
   (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 g)
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f₂)))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
            (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr2 f₂)))))
 
B: bicat
b: B
f₁, f₂: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (f · pr2 f₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
b: B
is_pstrans to_fiber_cod_unit_data

  
B: bicat
b: B
is_pstrans to_fiber_cod_unit_data

    
B: bicat
b: B
∏ (X Y : slice_bicat b) (f g : slice_bicat b ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(α : f ==> g),
(pr1 to_fiber_cod_unit_data X
 ◃ ## (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_cod to_fiber_cod) α)
• pr2 to_fiber_cod_unit_data X Y g =
pr2 to_fiber_cod_unit_data X Y f
• (## (id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b)) α
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_cod_unit_data Y)
B: bicat
b: B
∏ X : slice_bicat b,
(pr1 to_fiber_cod_unit_data X

lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
• (((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) ▹ pr1 g)
   • (runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g))

B: bicat

 η] pr2

  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
   :
   pr1
     (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
              (pr2 f))

              (pr1 f) (pr2 y)))) ==>
   pr1
     (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,

           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
              (pr2 f)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)

              (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr2 y)))))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
             rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite linvunitor_assoc ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
             apply idpath).

  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
    :
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
               (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 f))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell
               (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (pr2 y)))) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
               (pr2 f)))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
               (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr2 y))))),,
   to_fiber_cod_unit_inv_data_subproof x y f
   :
   (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
            (pr2 f))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
            (pr1 f) (pr2 y)))) ==>
   (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)) (pr2 f)))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y)))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
            (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr2 y)))))

(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
   • (pr1 f
      ◃ ((lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g))
         • runitor (pr1 g))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
   • (pr1 f
      ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g)
         • (rinvunitor (pr1 g) • runitor (pr1 g)))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
   • (pr1 f ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • id₂ (pr1 g))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
   • (pr1 f ◃ lunitor (pr1 g)))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ y, z ⟧
(runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
• (pr1 f ◃ lunitor (pr1 g))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g =
rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
• (pr1 f ◃ lunitor (pr1 g))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice_bicat b ⟦ y, z ⟧
runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g = runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (id_psfunctor (slice_bicat b))

 exact to_fiber_cod_unit_inv_is_pstrans.
  Defined.

  (**
   5. The counit
   *)
  
B: bicat
b: B
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
  (id_psfunctor
     (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b))

B: bicat
b: B
∏
X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X,
id_psfunctor
  (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X ⟧
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(X
 Y : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X
   · # (id_psfunctor
          (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f
   · ?η₁ Y)

    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X,
id_psfunctor
  (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X ⟧
 
B: bicat
b: B
∏ X : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 X ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 X · id₁ b) (fD · pr2 X)

      
B: bicat
b: B
f: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧
invertible_2cell (pr2 f · id₁ b) (id₁ (pr1 f) · pr2 f)

      exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)).
    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(X
 Y : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (((λ f0 : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
     id₁ (pr1 f0),,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f0))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f0)))
    :
    ∏
    X0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
    strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
    ⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X0,
    id_psfunctor
      (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X0 ⟧) X
   · # (id_psfunctor
          (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f
   · ((λ f0 : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
       id₁ (pr1 f0),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f0))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 f0)))
      :
      ∏
      X0 : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
      strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
      ⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X0,
      id_psfunctor
        (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X0 ⟧) Y)
 
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell
  ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
   · # (id_psfunctor
          (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f
   · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))))

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id₁ (pr1 x),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
· # (id_psfunctor
       (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f ==>
# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f
· (id₁ (pr1 y),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y)))

 comp_of_invertible_2cell

   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
· # (id_psfunctor

# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f

B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
   · # (id_psfunctor
          (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                     from_fiber_cod) f
                · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                   comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))
                     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 y))))
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ xx : pr1
          ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
           · # (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_fiber_bicat
                     (cod_disp_bicat B)
                     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                             from_fiber_cod) f
                        · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                           comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 y))
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 y)))),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
       · # (id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
         f
       · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y)))))
   in
 pr2
   ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
    · # (id_psfunctor
           (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (# (comp_psfunctor
                                 to_fiber_cod
                                 from_fiber_cod) f
                            · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                               comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                 (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                    (pr2 y))
                                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                    (pr2 y))))) ?pr1

        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
   · # (id_psfunctor
          (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                     from_fiber_cod) f
                · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                   comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))
                     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr2 y))))
 
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f ==> pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y)

          exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ xx : pr1
          ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
           · # (id_psfunctor
                  (strict_fiber_bicat
                     (cod_disp_bicat B)
                     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                             from_fiber_cod) f
                        · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                           comp_of_invertible_2cell
                             (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 y))
                             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                (pr2 y)))),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
       · # (id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
         f
       · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 y)))))
   in
 pr2
   ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
    · # (id_psfunctor
           (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (# (comp_psfunctor
                                 to_fiber_cod
                                 from_fiber_cod) f
                            · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                               comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                 (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                    (pr2 y))
                                 (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                    (pr2 y)))))
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
   :
   pr1
     ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
      · # (id_psfunctor
             (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
   id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                        from_fiber_cod) f
                   · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                      comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (runitor_invertible_2cell
                           (pr2 y))
                        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           (pr2 y)))))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 3 apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             refine (!_) ;
             etrans ;
             [ do 4 apply maponpaths ;
               rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
               apply triangle_l_inv
             | ] ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
             rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             rewrite <- runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite runitor_lunitor_identity ;
             apply lunitor_lwhisker).
      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
    :
    pr1
      ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
       · # (id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f) ==>[
    id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                   (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                         from_fiber_cod) f
                    · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
                       comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (runitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 y))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 y))))),,
   to_fiber_cod_counit_data_subproof x y f)
 
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b))
  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)),,
   to_fiber_cod_counit_data_subproof x y f)

        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)),,
      to_fiber_cod_counit_data_subproof x y f))

        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
b: B
is_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_data

  
B: bicat
b: B
is_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_data

    
B: bicat
b: B
∏
(X
 Y : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
(f
 g : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(α : f ==> g),
(pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_data X
 ◃ ##
     (id_psfunctor
        (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) α)
• pr2 to_fiber_cod_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 to_fiber_cod_counit_data X Y f
• (## (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) α
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_data Y)
B: bicat
b: B
∏

      (psfunctor_comp to_fiber_cod
         (# from_fiber_cod f) (# from_fiber_cod g))
    • pr1
        (## to_fiber_cod
           (psfunctor_comp from_fiber_cod f g)))
   ▹ pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_data z)) =
(pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_data x)
 ◃ pr1
     (psfunctor_comp
        (id_psfunctor
           (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f g))
• pr1 (pr2 to_fiber_cod_counit_data x z (f · g))

   ▹ id₁ (pr1 z)) =
