   :
   ∏
   X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
   strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
   ⟦ id_psfunctor
       (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
   comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
  id₁ (pr1 x),,
  comp_of_invertible_2cell
    (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
    (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
 :
 ∏
 X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
 strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
   (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
 ⟦ id_psfunctor
     (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
 comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) x
· # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f ==>
# (id_psfunctor
     (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f
· ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
    id₁ (pr1 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
   :
   ∏
   X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
   strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
   ⟦ id_psfunctor
       (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
   comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y
 
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
     id₁ (pr1 x),,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
    :
    ∏
    X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
    strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
    ⟦ id_psfunctor
        (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
    comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) x
   · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (# (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_fiber_bicat
                        (cod_disp_bicat B)
                        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b))
                  f
                · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                    id₁ (pr1 x),,
                    comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (runitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 x))
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 x)))
                   :
                   ∏
                   X : strict_fiber_bicat
                         (cod_disp_bicat B)
                         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
                   strict_fiber_bicat
                     (cod_disp_bicat B)
                     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
                   ⟦ id_psfunctor
                       (strict_fiber_bicat
                          (cod_disp_bicat B)
                          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
                       X,
                   comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                     from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y)
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ xx : pr1
          (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
             id₁ (pr1 x),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
            :
            ∏
            X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
            strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
            ⟦ id_psfunctor
                (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                   (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
            comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod
              X ⟧) x
           · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                  from_fiber_cod) f) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (# (id_psfunctor
                             (strict_fiber_bicat
                                (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                   B) b)) f
                        · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                            id₁ (pr1 x),,
                            comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (pr2 x))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (pr2 x)))
                           :
                           ∏
                           X : strict_fiber_bicat
                                 (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                    B) b,
                           strict_fiber_bicat
                             (cod_disp_bicat B)
                             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                             b
                           ⟦ id_psfunctor
                               (strict_fiber_bicat
                                  (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                  (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                     B) b) X,
                           comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                             from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
         id₁ (pr1 x),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
        :
        ∏
        X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
        strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
        ⟦ id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
        comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧)
         x
       · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
           f)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (# (id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f
       · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
           id₁ (pr1 x),,
           comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
          :
          ∏
          X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
          strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
          ⟦ id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
          comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X
          ⟧) y)) in
 pr2
   (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
      id₁ (pr1 x),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
     :
     ∏
     X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
     strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
     ⟦ id_psfunctor
         (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
     comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) x
    · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (# (id_psfunctor
                                 (strict_fiber_bicat
                                    (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                    (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                       B) b)) f
                            · ((λ x : ∑ d : B,
                                      B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                                id₁ (pr1 x),,
                                comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                  (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                     (pr2 x))
                                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                     (pr2 x)))
                               :
                               ∏
                               X : strict_fiber_bicat
                                     (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                     (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                        B) b,
                               strict_fiber_bicat
                                 (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                    B) b
                               ⟦ id_psfunctor
                                   (strict_fiber_bicat
                                      (cod_disp_bicat
                                         B)
                                      (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                         B) b) X,
                               comp_psfunctor
                                 to_fiber_cod
                                 from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y))
  ?pr1

        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
     id₁ (pr1 x),,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
    :
    ∏
    X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
    strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
    ⟦ id_psfunctor
        (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
    comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) x
   · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (# (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_fiber_bicat
                        (cod_disp_bicat B)
                        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b))
                  f
                · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                    id₁ (pr1 x),,
                    comp_of_invertible_2cell
                      (runitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 x))
                      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                         (pr2 x)))
                   :
                   ∏
                   X : strict_fiber_bicat
                         (cod_disp_bicat B)
                         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
                   strict_fiber_bicat
                     (cod_disp_bicat B)
                     (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
                   ⟦ id_psfunctor
                       (strict_fiber_bicat
                          (cod_disp_bicat B)
                          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)
                       X,
                   comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                     from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y)
 
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f ==> pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y)

          exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ xx : pr1
          (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
             id₁ (pr1 x),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))

            :

            X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
            strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
            ⟦ id_psfunctor
                (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                   (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
            comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod
              X ⟧) x
           · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                  from_fiber_cod) f) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (# (id_psfunctor
                             (strict_fiber_bicat
                                (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                   B) b)) f
                        · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                            id₁ (pr1 x),,
                            comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (pr2 x))
                              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (pr2 x)))
                           :
                           ∏
                           X : strict_fiber_bicat
                                 (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                    B) b,
                           strict_fiber_bicat
                             (cod_disp_bicat B)
                             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                             b
                           ⟦ id_psfunctor
                               (strict_fiber_bicat
                                  (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                  (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                     B) b) X,
                           comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                             from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
         id₁ (pr1 x),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
        :
        ∏
        X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
        strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
        ⟦ id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
        comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧)
         x
       · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
           f)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (# (id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f
       · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
           id₁ (pr1 x),,
           comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
          :
          ∏
          X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
          strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
          ⟦ id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
          comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X
          ⟧) y)) in
 pr2
   (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
      id₁ (pr1 x),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
     :
     ∏
     X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
     strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
       (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
     ⟦ id_psfunctor
         (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
     comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧) x
    · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (# (id_psfunctor
                                 (strict_fiber_bicat
                                    (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                    (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                       B) b)) f
                            · ((λ x : ∑ d : B,
                                      B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                                id₁ (pr1 x),,
                                comp_of_invertible_2cell
                                  (runitor_invertible_2cell
                                     (pr2 x))
                                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                     (pr2 x)))
                               :
                               ∏
                               X : strict_fiber_bicat
                                     (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                     (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                        B) b,
                               strict_fiber_bicat
                                 (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                    B) b
                               ⟦ id_psfunctor
                                   (strict_fiber_bicat
                                      (cod_disp_bicat
                                         B)
                                      (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                         B) b) X,
                               comp_psfunctor
                                 to_fiber_cod
                                 from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y))
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
   :
   pr1
     (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
        id₁ (pr1 x),,
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
       :
       ∏
       X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
       strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
       ⟦ id_psfunctor
           (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
       comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧)
        x
      · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
          f) ==>[
   id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                  (# (id_psfunctor
                        (strict_fiber_bicat
                           (cod_disp_bicat B)
                           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                           b)) f
                   · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                       id₁ (pr1 x),,
                       comp_of_invertible_2cell
                         (runitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 x))
                         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                            (pr2 x)))
                      :
                      ∏
                      X : strict_fiber_bicat
                            (cod_disp_bicat B)
                            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                            b,
                      strict_fiber_bicat
                        (cod_disp_bicat B)
                        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
                      ⟦ id_psfunctor
                          (strict_fiber_bicat
                             (cod_disp_bicat B)
                             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                             b) X,
                      comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                        from_fiber_cod X ⟧) y))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite runitor_rinvunitor ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             rewrite runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
             rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             rewrite <- runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite runitor_lunitor_identity ;
             rewrite lunitor_lwhisker ;
             apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
    :
    pr1
      (((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
         id₁ (pr1 x),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr2 x)))
        :
        ∏
        X : strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b,
        strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
          (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
        ⟦ id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b) X,
        comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod X ⟧)
         x
       · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
           f) ==>[
    id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                   (# (id_psfunctor
                         (strict_fiber_bicat
                            (cod_disp_bicat B)
                            (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                            b)) f
                    · ((λ x : ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, b ⟧,
                        id₁ (pr1 x),,
                        comp_of_invertible_2cell
                          (runitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 x))
                          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                             (pr2 x)))
                       :
                       ∏
                       X : strict_fiber_bicat
                             (cod_disp_bicat B)
                             (cod_local_iso_cleaving B)
                             b,
                       strict_fiber_bicat
                         (cod_disp_bicat B)

           (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
              (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f g)
   ▹ pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_inv_data z))

 ◃ pr1

        g))

B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b

g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f g) =
?t2

        exact (comp_cod_fiber
                 (psfunctor_comp
                    to_fiber_cod
                    (# from_fiber_cod f)
                    (# from_fiber_cod g))
                 (## to_fiber_cod (psfunctor_comp from_fiber_cod f g))).
      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
(pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_inv_data x)
 ◃ (pr1
      (psfunctor_comp to_fiber_cod
         (# from_fiber_cod f) (# from_fiber_cod g))
    • pr1
        (## to_fiber_cod
           (psfunctor_comp from_fiber_cod f g))))

((((lassociator

               from_fiber_cod) g))

       ▹ pr1
           (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                 from_fiber_cod) g)))
   • rassociator
       (pr1
          (# (id_psfunctor
                (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                   (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f))
       (pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_inv_data y))
       (pr1
          (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                from_fiber_cod) g)))
  • (pr1
       (# (id_psfunctor
             (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f)
     ◃ pr1 (pr2 to_fiber_cod_counit_inv_data y z g)))
 • lassociator
     (pr1
        (# (id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) f))
     (pr1
        (# (id_psfunctor
              (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
                 (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) g))
     (pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_inv_data z)))

           (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)

   ▹ pr1 (pr1 to_fiber_cod_counit_inv_data z))

B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
(id₁ (pr1 x)
 ◃ (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) • id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g)))
• (lunitor (pr1 (f · g)) • rinvunitor (pr1 (f · g))) =
((((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
    • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) ▹ pr1 g))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g))
  • (pr1 f ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g))))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z)))
• (pr1 (id₂ (f · g)) ▹ id₁ (pr1 z))

?b

(((lunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)
   • (rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g))
  • rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g))

lunitor (pr1 (f · g)) • rinvunitor (pr1 (f · g))

lunitor (pr1 (f · g)) • rinvunitor (pr1 (f · g))

• (pr1 f ◃ lunitor (pr1 g)) = ?y'

        apply lunitor_lwhisker.
      
B: bicat
b: B
x, y, z: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ y, z ⟧
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• ((runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
   • rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)) =
rinvunitor (pr1 (f · g))

      apply id2_left.
      Opaque comp_psfunctor.
  Qed.

  Transparent strict_fiber_bicat comp_psfunctor.

          (cbn ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite lwhisker_hcomp, rwhisker_hcomp ;
           apply triangle_r).

B: bicat
b: B
x, y: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
• (pr1 f ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 y))) =
(linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)
• ((((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
      • (id₁ (pr1 x)
         ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))))
     • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
    • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
       ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)))

(((((linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)
    • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f))
   • (id₁ (pr1 x)
      ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))))
  • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
 • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
    ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))
• rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))

(((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)

           refine (!_) ;
           apply triangle_r).

    pr1
      (id_pstrans
         (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
         x)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit
         to_fiber_cod_counit_inv x)) in
 pr2
   (id_pstrans
      (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) x) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (comp_pstrans
                              to_fiber_cod_counit
                              to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
                              x)) ?pr1

      
B: bicat
b: B
x: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
pr1
  (id_pstrans
     (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) x) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit
                  to_fiber_cod_counit_inv x)
 exact (linvunitor _).
      
B: bicat
b: B
x: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
(λ xx : pr1
          (id_pstrans
             (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                from_fiber_cod) x) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (comp_pstrans
                          to_fiber_cod_counit
                          to_fiber_cod_counit_inv x),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (id_pstrans
         (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
         x)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit
         to_fiber_cod_counit_inv x)) in
 pr2
   (id_pstrans
      (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) x) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (comp_pstrans
                              to_fiber_cod_counit
                              to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
                              x))
  (linvunitor
     (pr1
        (id_pstrans
           (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
           x)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite <- lunitor_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite runitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
           apply idpath).

x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y) =
?y'

        
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b

  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
?y' =
(lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)

        apply rwhisker_vcomp.

       (pr1

       (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))) = ?b

B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y))
 • (rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))
• rassociator
    (pr1
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                  from_fiber_cod)) x y f))
    (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) =
lunitor
  (pr1
     (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f
      · id₁
          ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                     from_fiber_cod)) y)))
• (pr1
     (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f)
   ◃ linvunitor
       (pr1
          (id₁
             ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                        from_fiber_cod)) y))))

lunitor (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y))
• ((rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y))
   • rassociator
       (pr1
          ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                     from_fiber_cod)) x y f))
       (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))) =
lunitor
  (pr1

B: bicat

f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y))
• rassociator
    (pr1
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                  from_fiber_cod)) x y f))
    (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) =

B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator
  (pr1
     ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                from_fiber_cod)) x y f)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
  (id₁ (pr1 y)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ (pr1 y))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (pr1 f))) ^-1
• (pr1
     (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod) f)
   ◃ linvunitor
       (pr1
          (id₁
             ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                        from_fiber_cod)) y))))

    
B: bicat
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
f: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator
  (pr1
     ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                from_fiber_cod)) x y f)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
  (id₁ (pr1 y))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (pr1
        (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod from_fiber_cod)
           f))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
        (pr1
           (id₁
              ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod
                         from_fiber_cod)) y))))) ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ (pr1 y))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (pr1 f))) ^-1

    apply lunitor_lwhisker.
  Qed.

  Transparent comp_psfunctor strict_fiber_bicat.

B: bicat
b: B
x: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
pr1
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
     to_fiber_cod_counit x) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (id_pstrans
                  (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_fiber_bicat
                        (cod_disp_bicat B)
                        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b))
                  x)
B: bicat
b: B
x: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
(λ xx : pr1
          (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
             to_fiber_cod_counit x) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (id_pstrans
                          (id_psfunctor
                             (strict_fiber_bicat
                                (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                   B) b)) x),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
         to_fiber_cod_counit x)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (id_pstrans
         (id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) x)) in
 pr2
   (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
      to_fiber_cod_counit x) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (id_pstrans
                              (id_psfunctor
                                 (strict_fiber_bicat
                                    (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                    (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                       B) b)) x)) 
  ?pr1

      
B: bicat
b: B
x: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
pr1
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
     to_fiber_cod_counit x) ==>[
id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
               (id_pstrans
                  (id_psfunctor
                     (strict_fiber_bicat
                        (cod_disp_bicat B)
                        (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b))
                  x)
 exact (lunitor _).
      
B: bicat
b: B
x: strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b
(λ xx : pr1
          (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
             to_fiber_cod_counit x) ==>[
        id₂ (id₁ b)] pr1
                       (id_pstrans
                          (id_psfunctor
                             (strict_fiber_bicat
                                (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                   B) b)) x),
 let PPP :=
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
         to_fiber_cod_counit x)) ==>
   (id₁ b,,
    pr1
      (id_pstrans
         (id_psfunctor
            (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
               (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)) x)) in
 pr2
   (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
      to_fiber_cod_counit x) ==>[
 id₂ (id₁ b),, xx : PPP] pr2
                           (id_pstrans
                              (id_psfunctor
                                 (strict_fiber_bicat
                                    (cod_disp_bicat B)
                                    (cod_local_iso_cleaving
                                       B) b)) x))
  (lunitor (pr1 ((pr111 to_fiber_cod_counit) x)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite <- lunitor_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite runitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
           apply idpath).

id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) =
?t2

       (pr1
          ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_cod

(lunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)

  Transparent comp_psfunctor strict_fiber_bicat.

  Defined.

  (**
   7. The biequivalence
   *)

  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_cod_counit_inv
     to_fiber_cod_counit)
  (id_pstrans
     (id_psfunctor
        (strict_fiber_bicat (cod_disp_bicat B)
           (cod_local_iso_cleaving B) b)))
 exact cod_counit_inv_left.
  Defined.
End FiberOfCodomain.
